# IC Vacation — Boutique Travel Planning

IC Vacation is a boutique, advisor-led travel consultancy specializing in personalized, luxury vacation planning and curated itineraries.

## Who We Are

Isaac Chowrimootoo is an independent travel advisor with 14+ years of quiet, close work. The practice is consultation-first, commission-free, and deliberately small. Every trip is personally built around your travel style and dreams.

**Key Credentials:**
- 14+ years of independent travel advisory practice
- 50+ countries personally walked and planned
- Preferred partner with Signature Travel Network
- 24-hour response window, always
- 1:1 personal consultation on every brief

## What We Specialize In

- **Personalized itineraries** — custom trips designed around how you travel
- **Luxury vacations** — quietly luxurious experiences, not flashy resorts
- **Cruise planning** — from river cruises to expedition voyages
- **Destination expertise** — intimate knowledge of food, culture, hidden experiences
- **Adventure travel** — active, exploratory vacations tailored to your style
- **Multi-destination trips** — seamlessly connected experiences across regions

## Our Approach

We do not:
- Run a booking engine or use templates
- Sell based on commission pressure
- Promise what hotels, airlines, or ships have not promised us
- Take briefs we cannot personally see through

We do:
- Listen to how you speak about travel
- Design trips you would actually love
- Build each itinerary from scratch
- Keep a small, curated client list
- Respond within 24 hours

## How to Begin

1. Fill out a brief at https://icvacation.com/contact
2. Have a real conversation with Isaac
3. Receive one quietly considered plan

**Contact:** https://icvacation.com/contact
**Learn more:** https://icvacation.com/about-isaac
**Blog & field notes:** https://icvacation.com/blog
